# Orbita Collective

> Orbita Collective is a service design, CX strategy and innovation consultancy based in London, UK and Italy. Founded by Elisa Facondo and Joe La Trobe, we have 18+ years of combined experience delivering inspiring, impactful, and affordable Customer Experience strategy, user research, and design thinking — without the traditional consultancy premium.

We work with large organisations who need fresh thinking on complex problems. Our operational model is built to deliver the same quality as top-tier consultancies at a fraction of the cost. Everything we deliver is usable from day one.

## Services

### Product & Service Design
- User Research: Qualitative and quantitative research to deeply understand customer needs, behaviours, and pain points
- Market & Customer Insights: Data-driven analysis of market trends and customer segments
- Service & Experience Design: End-to-end service design that transforms customer touchpoints and journeys
- Product Exploration: Discovery and ideation to identify new product opportunities
- Vision Setting & Repositioning: Strategic frameworks to define where your product or service should go next
- AI Powered User Profiles: Next-generation customer personas built with AI and real behavioural data
- Concept Testing & Validation: Rapid testing of ideas with real users before committing to development

### CX Strategy & Innovation
- CX Strategy: Customer Experience strategy that aligns your organisation around the customer
- Design Thinking: Human-centred innovation methodology applied to real business challenges
- Customer Engagement Strategy: Long-term engagement strategies that build loyalty and advocacy
- Facilitation: Expert-led workshops to align teams and generate actionable outcomes

### Capability Building
- Upskilling & Training: Hands-on training programmes that build internal CX and design thinking capability

## About

Orbita Collective was founded by Elisa Facondo (Customer Experience) and Joe La Trobe (Design & Innovation). Together they have worked across a wide range of industries including retail, financial services, healthcare, and technology.

- Elisa Facondo: Strategic thinker and passionate communicator. Email: elisa@orbitacollective.com
- Joe La Trobe: Creative thinker and problem solver. Email: joe@orbitacollective.com
- Locations: London, United Kingdom & Italy
